entry.title: New BPA DOCYA132315BU0033 awarded to T-REX CONSULTING CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: DEPT OF COMM/BUREAU OF THE CENSUS

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: DEPT OF COMM/BUREAU OF THE CENSUS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Any warranted Contracting Officer with the required Department of Commerce (DOC) authorization can issue work orders for the following organizations: US Census Bureau HQ, US DOC, and any of its bureaus or offices.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS FRAMEWORK (ESF) FOR MULTI-TIERED ACQUISITION FRAMEWORK FOR SYSTEMS ENGINEERING AND INTEGRATION -- PROGRAM TIER THIS AWARD IS BEING MADE TO A CONTRACTOR TEAMING ARRANGEMENT (CTA) WITH THE FOLLOWING TWO CONTRACTORS: CTA LEAD: T-REX (DUNS: 062808535), GS-35F-022BA CTA MEMBER: Z INC. (DUNS: 116207838), GS-35F-453BA

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
